data.name: 變態女友：我與女友的心動動直播
data.detailed_description:
☆關於本作☆

本作是一款以「與可愛又富有好奇心的女友共度親密時光」為主題的戀愛模擬遊戲。

透過直播互動，你將與她一同探索內心深處的慾望，逐步解鎖令人臉紅心跳的親密體驗。

平日裡，你們只是一起工作的辦公室情侶。
但在直播平台上，隨著關係日漸深化，她的語氣與表情也將隨之改變——
即使是相同的行動，也會因親密度的變化而帶來全新的感受。

本作運用了 Live2D 技術與流暢的 60fps 動畫，讓你能更加直觀地沉浸於與她共享的甜蜜時光之中。

☆劇情簡介☆

你與「海美」是一對感情穩定、令人稱羨的辦公室戀人。

某天，海美突然表示將搬往遠方。

就在你思索該為她做些什麼時，她向你坦白了一個出乎意料的秘密：

「對不起……我啊，其實……是個有點變態的人喔。」

她說，想試著將兩人的親密互動進行直播。

你雖有些遲疑，但最終還是為了她答應了這個提議──
結果收到了遠超預期的打賞與關注……

於是，為了實現她的願望，也為了更進一步加深彼此的關係，

你們的「戀愛直播生活」正式展開。

☆核心玩法☆

◇ 每天與女友互動，決定當天的直播主題🌸

◇ 在直播中透過滑鼠操作觸碰、懸停等動作，觸發不同反應

◇ 隨著親密度提升，她會逐漸展現更坦率、主動的一面

☆兩種分歧結局☆

根據你的選擇與與她的關係發展，將可解鎖兩種不同結局。

☆特色一覽☆

◇ 與女友一同體驗「即時互動」的親密直播

◇ 採用 Live2D 技術與 60fps 無縫動畫，帶來細緻生動的互動體驗

◇ 女主角全語音演出，讓每一次對話與反應都更加真實

data.short_description: 對辦公室的所有人而言，你和海美正展開著一段令人稱羨的職場戀情。 然而，隨著她開始思考未來的方向，也坦率地向你吐露了那份埋藏已久的心願。 為了實現她的夢想，你們熱情而刺激的直播生活，就此揭開序幕。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL support, VRAM 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Steamy Livestreams with My Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
☆About This Game☆

This is a romance simulation game based on the theme of "passionate love with your cute, curious girlfriend".

Through the live stream, you and your girlfriend experiment with the desires hiding deep within your hearts as you deepen your heart-pounding, lovey-dovey romance.

You two are diligent workers at the office...

But as you deepen your relationship with stream after stream, her facial expressions and tone of voice towards you begin to change.

As her love levels increase, she'll have completely new reactions to the same acts, allowing you to enjoy a sense of progression.

Smooth 60fps animations using Live2D make for deeper, direct immersion as you interact with her during lovemaking sessions.

☆Summary☆

You and "Umi" are the office couple that everyone's jealous about.

But one day, you learn that Umi has to move away...

You start to think if there's anything you can do for her, but suddenly, Umi gives you a shocking confession!

"I'm sorry... but I'm actually a huge pervert."

She tells you that she wants to live stream the two of you having sex.

You're a little hesitant at first, but you decide to accept her suggestion since that's what she wants—

But the stream blows up beyond your imagination and you get showered with superchats...

You want to make her dream come true and deepen your relationship...

And thus begins your "lovey-dovey live stream" with Umi.

☆How to Play☆

◇ Interact with your girlfriend each day and decide the stream theme of the day🌸

◇ During the live stream, click and drag with your mouse and see all the ways she reacts

◇ By raising her love levels, she'll become even bolder and more honest with her desires

☆Two Endings☆

Your dialog choices and the depth of your relationship will decide one of two endings.

☆Highlights☆

◇ Experience "real time" lovey-dovey live streams with your girlfriend

◇ Smooth, seamless 60fps Live2D animation recreating a detailed sense of physical contact

◇ A fully-voiced heroine adds even more realism to conversations and reactions!

data.short_description: You and Umi are the office couple all of your coworkers are jealous about. Now that she has to plan for her career, she opens up to you about a desire she has hidden deep within her heart. In order to fulfill her dream, you must start a steamy stream of your passion as a couple.
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL support, VRAM 1 GB
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
